command: gcloud logging read 'logName="projects/xtec-lab/logs/cloudaudit.googleapis.com%2Factivity" AND protoPayload.methodName:("google.cloud.compute.v1.Firewalls.Insert" OR "google.cloud.compute.v1.Firewalls.Update" OR "google.cloud.compute.v1.Firewalls.Patch" OR "google.cloud.compute.v1.Firewalls.Delete") AND timestamp>="2026-02-15T23:50:51Z"' --project=xtec-lab --limit=150 --format=json
